title: penstemon menziesii var. lewisii
intro: Penstemon menziesii var. lewisii, also known as Lewis' Penstemon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the plantain family and is native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Penstemon menziesii var. lewisii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in salves and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
